title: 为 OpenRouter 请求添加指数退避重试
description: 当前 pi_agent_openrouter.py 中，OpenRouter 返回 429/502/503 时直接包装成 StreamErrorEvent 抛给用户，不重试。需要在 _pump_openrouter_stream 调用层添加指数退避重试逻辑，覆盖 429（rate limit）、502/503/504（网关错误）场景，最大重试 3 次，首次等待 1s，指数增长，加 jitter。
close_reason: 已实现 _pump_with_retry，覆盖 429/502/503/504 及网络异常，指数退避+jitter，支持 Retry-After header，10 tests 通过

title: 补齐 Resume Agent 性能观测字段
description: 在现有本地观测栈和 runtime trace 上补充 agent 性能字段，记录 tool_profile、工具数量、prompt_chars、message_count、首 token 延迟、OpenRouter usage 和工具确认等待耗时。目标是让后续优化可量化。
acceptance_criteria: agent.trace.llm.request/response 或等价事件包含新增字段；本地日志或指标能对比优化前后；不改变用户可见 SSE 协议。
close_reason: Implemented Resume Agent runtime profile, observability, confirmation hook, session, conversion, OpenRouter adapter, and context compaction slice; verified with backend full pytest and basedpyright.

title: 按意图收敛 Resume Agent 工具集
description: 基于 Pi Agent active tools 思路，为简历 Agent 增加 tool profile：只读问答、简历编辑、JD 匹配、观测诊断分别只暴露必要工具。目标是减少每轮工具 schema 体积、降低误调用、改善首包延迟。
acceptance_criteria: 同一条只读问题的 LLM 请求工具数量明显下降；agent.trace.llm.request 记录 tool_profile；现有工具确认和简历保存行为不回归。
close_reason: Implemented Resume Agent runtime profile, observability, confirmation hook, session, conversion, OpenRouter adapter, and context compaction slice; verified with backend full pytest and basedpyright.

title: Upgrade Beads AGENTS integration block
description: Why: current AGENTS.md uses the old bd setup codex block and does not statically include session completion rules. What: replace it with the bd integration minimal block that requires git push before work is complete.
close_reason: Completed: replaced old bd setup codex block with Beads integration minimal block including mandatory session completion and push rules.

title: Limit Resume Agent first optimization to one confirmable change
description: Why: first JD-based optimization currently lets the model plan and emit many tool calls before the user sees progress, causing a long 'thinking' period. What: make the first optimization round produce one fast, confirmable diff before continuing, with regression coverage.
close_reason: Completed: limited streaming first round to one confirmable business tool, tightened prompt, reduced Resume Agent max_tokens, and verified tests.

title: paused session 超时自动 fail 防止永久挂起
description: confirmation_manager 是进程内状态，服务重启后等待确认的 session 永远处于 paused 状态无法自动清理。需要：1) 给 paused session 设置超时时间（如 10 分钟）；2) 后台 sweeper 定期扫描超时 paused session 并将其标记为 failed；3) 重启时对所有残留 paused session 执行同样清理。防止 DB 中积压僵尸 session。
close_reason: 已实现 session_sweeper.py + main.py startup/shutdown 集成，超时 paused session 自动 fail，60s 轮询，4 tests 通过

title: Improve Resume Agent tool-call reliability
description: Why: Resume Agent must run smoothly and call resume tools correctly before deeper product work. What: add a focused regression test around tool-call prompting/selection and patch the smallest prompt or service seam needed so the agent consistently produces confirmable resume diffs.
close_reason: Completed: added Resume Agent tool argument normalization, prompt tool-call protocol, smoke mutation detection, and verified backend tests plus real model smoke.

title: 修复编辑页 mount 时的 console.error：找出哪个 API 调用失败并修复根因
description:
attached_molecule: cr-wisp-n8h0
attached_formula: mol-polecat-work
attached_at: 2026-05-14T01:05:13Z
attached_vars: ["base_branch=main"]
dispatched_by: mayor
convoy_id: hq-cv-64k26
formula_vars: base_branch=main

编辑页（/resume/[id]/edit）加载时立刻出现 console.error，错误来自 httpClient.ts:44，说明某个 handleApiResponse 调用返回了非字符串的 detail（对象或数组）。候选是 loadChatHistory 调用的 GET /api/resumes/{id}/chat-messages。请：1. 确认是哪个接口失败；2. 找出为什么失败；3. 修复根因。本地项目在 /Users/psx849261680/Desktop/projects/chat-resume。
notes: Confirmed failure source from local backend logs: 2026-05-14T00:53:03Z recorded GET /api/resumes/NaN/chat-messages and GET /api/resumes/NaN, both 422. Root cause is edit page passing an invalid route id through parseInt into resume/chat APIs. Fix validates params.id before passing it to editor/chat hooks and redirects authenticated invalid routes to dashboard. Added e2e coverage that /zh/resume/NaN/edit makes no /api/resumes/NaN requests.
close_reason: Merged in cr-wisp-e1u

title: 将工具确认流程抽象为 hook 语义
description: 参考 Pi Agent beforeToolCall/afterToolCall/terminate，将当前 preview、等待确认、确认后终止文本等逻辑从工具执行包装层拆出，形成可测试的权限与确认边界，同时保留现有用户体验。
acceptance_criteria: 确认策略与工具实际执行职责分离；确认、拒绝、终止当前轮次均有单测；现有工具确认 UI 和简历保存不回归。
close_reason: Implemented Resume Agent runtime profile, observability, confirmation hook, session, conversion, OpenRouter adapter, and context compaction slice; verified with backend full pytest and basedpyright.

title: 设计业务版 ResumeAgentSession
description: 参考 Pi AgentSession 的长期状态层，但只保留简历产品需要的能力：LLM transcript、当前 tool profile、模型配置、确认中的 tool call、usage、摘要边界。复用现有 DB session/store，不引入 coding-agent 文件会话全套。
acceptance_criteria: 形成可实现的 ResumeAgentSession 最小接口；能从持久化数据重建下一轮 LLM 上下文；不破坏现有 SSE replay 和工具确认恢复。
close_reason: Implemented Resume Agent runtime profile, observability, confirmation hook, session, conversion, OpenRouter adapter, and context compaction slice; verified with backend full pytest and basedpyright.

title: 为 Pi runtime 建立显式 convert_to_llm 边界
description: 参考 Pi Agent 的 AgentMessage 到 LLM Message 转换边界，替换当前透传式 convert_to_llm，明确哪些消息进入模型，哪些只用于 UI、审计或恢复。为后续摘要、确认消息和观测结果入上下文打基础。
acceptance_criteria: PiAgentRuntime 使用独立转换函数；转换函数覆盖 user/assistant/toolResult 和内部消息过滤；相关单测锁定不会把 internal_only/UI 事件发送给 LLM。
close_reason: Implemented Resume Agent runtime profile, observability, confirmation hook, session, conversion, OpenRouter adapter, and context compaction slice; verified with backend full pytest and basedpyright.

title: 补齐安全与质量基线文档
description: Why: docs/SECURITY.md 和 docs/QUALITY_SCORE.md 仍是占位内容，缺少当前项目可执行的安全配置清单、认证授权模型、数据保留说明和质量基线。 What: 基于当前仓库代码和真实验证命令更新两个文档，不触碰正在进行的 SSE 后端改动。
close_reason: Completed: updated docs/SECURITY.md with security/config/auth/data-retention/vendor checklist and docs/QUALITY_SCORE.md with current quality baseline plus verified backend/frontend gates.

title: Fix frontend hydration warning and missing browser icons
description: The /zh page reports a React hydration attribute mismatch caused by browser-injected html attributes, and requests for favicon/apple-touch icons return 404. Add the smallest frontend fix and verify the route no longer reports these local issues.
close_reason: Fixed html hydration warning from browser-injected attributes and added favicon/apple-touch static assets; verified type-check, build, curl, and Playwright hydration probe.

title: OpenRouter 调用添加 circuit breaker
description: OpenRouter 持续故障时，每个请求都会等到 read timeout（90s），会积压连接，asyncio task 不断增长。需要在 pi_agent_openrouter.py 中引入 circuit breaker：连续失败 N 次后进入 open 状态，直接返回错误不再发出请求；经过冷却期后进入 half-open 探测状态；成功后恢复 closed。
close_reason: Completed: added OpenRouter circuit breaker with fast-fail open state, cooldown probe, success reset, config knobs, and retry regression tests.

title: 实现简历上下文摘要与压缩机制
description: 参考 Pi Agent compaction，但先做简历产品专用版本：用当前简历结构摘要、已确认 diff summary、最近对话替代每轮全量简历 JSON，逐步降低长会话 token 成本和上下文退化。
acceptance_criteria: 长会话达到阈值后能生成并复用摘要；摘要保留已确认修改和关键 JD/简历事实；普通短会话行为不变化；有测试覆盖摘要边界。
close_reason: Implemented Resume Agent runtime profile, observability, confirmation hook, session, conversion, OpenRouter adapter, and context compaction slice; verified with backend full pytest and basedpyright.

title: SSE 流式响应支持断点续传 event cursor
description: 当前 SSE 连接断开后整个流丢失，前端必须重新发消息。需要：1) 每个 SSE 事件附加单调递增 event_id；2) 前端重连时携带 Last-Event-ID header；3) 服务端根据 cursor 从 session event log 中回放已发出但客户端未收到的事件。依赖 AgentSessionStore 中已有的事件持久化机制。
close_reason: Completed: added SSE event ids, persisted public stream events, Last-Event-ID replay, and frontend cursor handling with type/backend regression coverage.
